task_completion.description: Load the countries GeoJSON vector layer into QGIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS Layers panel shows 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' and the map canvas displays the world countries vector layer.

task_completion.description: Set the layer symbology to Graduated using the POP_EST field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer Properties dialog is open to the Symbology tab, the top dropdown is set to 'Graduated', and the 'Value' field is set to 'POP_EST'.

task_completion.description: Classify the data into at least 5 classes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The classes list in the Symbology tab shows 5 or more distinct classification ranges/colors for the population data.

task_completion.description: Apply the symbology to visualize the thematic choropleth map
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main QGIS map canvas displays the world map with countries filled with different colors corresponding to the graduated symbology classes.

task_completion.description: Save the QGIS project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Project' dialog shows the path ending in 'world_population_map.qgz', or the main QGIS window title bar updates to show 'world_population_map'.

task_completion.description: Export the map as a PNG image with minimum dimensions
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Map as Image' or 'Print Layout' export dialog is visible, showing the filename 'world_population_map.png' and output resolution/dimensions set to at least 800x600 pixels.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGIS graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus, dialogs, and panels rather than relying entirely on a terminal or Python script to generate the outputs.

integrity.description: The map canvas shows a genuine rendering of the vector data
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas displays actual vector geometries being styled, not an imported static image or a pre-rendered web map tile layer used as a shortcut.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to create fake output files
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing commands like 'touch' or 'cp' being used to create empty or copied files at the expected project and image paths.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target field for the graduated symbology is 'POP_EST'. The classification must contain at least 5 classes. The dataset contains 177 features with population estimates ranging from 140 to 1,397,715,000. Verify that the map canvas actually reflects a 5+ class choropleth map based on these values.
